marketing.forBrands.meta.title: For Brands
marketing.forBrands.meta.description: Run private creator campaign workspaces in any market from one dashboard.
marketing.forBrands.headline:
Private campaigns.
Proof across markets.
marketing.forBrands.subheadline: Invite the creators you actually want, then use PopsDrops to brief, gate, localize, collect proof, and report.
marketing.forBrands.pain.label: The problem
marketing.forBrands.pain.title: Why cross-border campaigns fail
marketing.forBrands.pain.1.solution: Use PopsDrops as the private room for rules, usage rights, locked materials, approvals, proof, and report history.
marketing.forBrands.pain.2.problem: Your brief is in English. Your audience isn't.
marketing.forBrands.pain.2.solution: Briefs are translated into each creator's language. Requirements stay precise across every market.
marketing.forBrands.pain.3.problem: Leadership needs proof, not a screenshot chase.
marketing.forBrands.pain.3.solution: Creators submit source evidence, confirm metrics, and give your team a report that shows what is verified, missed, or corrected.
marketing.forBrands.dashboard.label: Your campaign desk
marketing.forBrands.dashboard.title: Private execution for every market

marketing.about.meta.title: About PopsDrops
marketing.about.meta.description: We built PopsDrops to make cross-border creator campaigns and market entry work.
marketing.about.label: About PopsDrops
marketing.about.headline: The hard part was never building the product.
marketing.about.intro: We built products, ran factories, managed inventory. We thought creation was the challenge. It wasn't. The real challenge was getting what we made into the hands of the people who needed it.
marketing.about.pullquote: The economics of every business come down to one thing: connecting the right product with the right person, at the right time.
marketing.about.thesis.label: Our Thesis
marketing.about.thesis.headline: Cash flow is everything. Distribution is how you get there.
marketing.about.thesis.p1: A warehouse full of product is not an asset. It's frozen capital. Marketing is not optional, even word of mouth needs someone to speak first. We spent years running campaigns, managing platforms, placing ads. We learned that the infrastructure connecting brands to audiences is broken across borders, across languages, across cultures. So we built the infrastructure we wished existed.
marketing.about.platform.label: The Platform
marketing.about.platform.headline: Two sides. One standard.
marketing.about.platform.brands.title: For Brands
marketing.about.platform.brands.desc: Brief, manage, and measure creator campaigns in markets you can't reach alone. Translated briefs, vetted creators, real performance data. No guesswork.
marketing.about.platform.creators.title: For Creators
marketing.about.platform.creators.desc: If you have influence, you should be compensated for it. Your work visible, your rates fair, your campaigns professional. Your talent deserves a platform that takes it seriously.
marketing.about.standards.label: Our Standards
marketing.about.standards.headline: Not everyone gets in. That's the point.
marketing.about.standards.p1: PopsDrops is not an open marketplace. Brands are invited. Creators are vetted. We review every profile, every company, every campaign. This is how we maintain the quality of results on both sides.
marketing.about.standards.p2: Language is never a barrier. Our platform translates everything natively in any language. But quality is non-negotiable. As a brand, you can invite your own creators. As a creator, you can ask brands to bring you in. The bar stays high so every collaboration delivers.
marketing.about.beyond.label: Beyond Campaigns
marketing.about.beyond.headline: When there is good business, we make the introduction.
marketing.about.beyond.p1: Influence opens doors. We've seen a creator with 10,000 followers build a successful franchising business. It started with intent, then action. Beyond creator campaigns, we broker partnerships between international brands and local distributors: market entry, franchising, distribution. Our network exists because of the relationships this platform creates.
marketing.about.origin.label: Who We Are
marketing.about.origin.headline: We've built, shipped, and operated.
marketing.about.origin.p1: We are not observers. We've run marketing platforms, built CRM systems, created brands, architected secure banking infrastructure, operated news organizations, managed franchises, and brokered international market entry. We know what it takes because we've done it across industries, across borders, across languages.
marketing.about.origin.entity: Tengri Vertex, LLC, incorporated in Delaware, based in San Francisco.
marketing.about.closing.sub: An idea in the back of your mind is still just an idea. We built PopsDrops because we believe in action.
